message:
test(fcp-core): pin LifecycleState 7x7 transition truth table + predicate matrix (flywheel_connectors-gbsko)

Bead asks for RegistrySync state machine pinning per documented state
machine. No type literally named RegistrySync exists in fcp-core; the
closest analogue with a documented state machine is LifecycleState +
LifecycleRecord::transition() at lifecycle.rs:44+322, whose
validate_transition() enumerates every legal (from, to) cell.

Coverage: 7-variant LifecycleState snake_case serde rename + Display +
PascalCase rejection sentinel, exhaustive predicate truth tables for
is_active/can_start_canary/can_promote/can_rollback, full 7x7 transition
truth table (49 cells with documented allow-list mirror), self-transition
denied for every state, transition() success path mutates state +
appends LifecycleTransition with current timestamp, transition() failure
path leaves state + transitions vec untouched, LifecycleError::InvalidTransition
Display mentions both states, TransitionReason internally-tagged
snake_case serde matrix with payload preservation
(InstallComplete/ManualPromotion/Uninstalled/AutoPromotion/AutoRollback),
LifecycleRecord JSON round-trip preserves full transition history.

14 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-gbsko cargo test -p
fcp-core --test registry_sync_state_machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
